name: Crafting Table
description: Place 4 wooden planks in a 2x2 square in the inventory crafting grid. Expands the crafting grid to 3x3.

name: Wooden Pickaxe
description: In a crafting table, place 3 wooden planks across the top row and 2 sticks in the middle column.

name: Stone Pickaxe
description: In a crafting table, place 3 cobblestone across the top row and 2 sticks in the middle column.

name: Iron Pickaxe
description: In a crafting table, place 3 iron ingots across the top row and 2 sticks in the middle column.

name: Diamond Pickaxe
description: In a crafting table, place 3 diamonds across the top row and 2 sticks in the middle column.

name: Wooden Axe
description: In a crafting table, place 3 wooden planks in the top-left, top-middle, and middle-left, plus 2 sticks vertically in the middle-right.

name: Stone Axe
description: In a crafting table, place 3 cobblestone in the top-left, top-middle, and middle-left, plus 2 sticks vertically in the middle-right.

name: Iron Axe
description: In a crafting table, place 3 iron ingots in the top-left, top-middle, and middle-left, plus 2 sticks vertically in the middle-right.

name: Diamond Axe
description: In a crafting table, place 3 diamonds in the top-left, top-middle, and middle-left, plus 2 sticks vertically in the middle-right.

name: Iron Sword
description: In a crafting table, place 2 iron ingots vertically in the middle column and 1 stick below them.

name: Diamond Sword
description: In a crafting table, place 2 diamonds vertically in the middle column and 1 stick below them.

name: Furnace
description: In a crafting table, place 8 cobblestone in a ring, leaving the center empty.

name: Chest
description: In a crafting table, place 8 wooden planks in a ring, leaving the center empty.

name: Torch
description: Place coal or charcoal above a stick in the crafting grid. Makes 4 torches.

name: Stick
description: Place 2 wooden planks vertically in the crafting grid. Makes 4 sticks.

name: Bucket
description: In a crafting table, place 3 iron ingots in a V shape. Used to collect and place liquids.

name: Flint and Steel
description: Place 1 iron ingot and 1 flint diagonally in the crafting grid. Used to ignite portals and TNT.

name: Nether Portal
description: Build a rectangular frame of obsidian at least 4 blocks wide and 5 blocks tall, leaving a 2x3 hole. Ignite the inside with flint and steel.

name: Iron Ingot
description: Smelt raw iron or iron ore in a furnace with fuel such as coal or charcoal.

name: Gold Ingot
description: Smelt raw gold or gold ore in a furnace with fuel such as coal or charcoal.

name: Glass
description: Smelt sand in a furnace. Glass is transparent and used for windows and bottles.

name: Stone Bricks
description: Place 4 stone blocks in a 2x2 square in the crafting grid. Used for strong building blocks.

name: Wooden Planks
description: Place any log in the crafting grid to get 4 matching planks. Used for crafting and building.

name: Paper
description: Place 3 sugar canes horizontally in the crafting grid. Used for books, maps, and banners.

name: Book
description: Place 3 paper and 1 leather in the crafting grid in a 2x2 pattern with leather in the bottom-right. Used for bookshelves and enchanting.
